{{Infobox technique
| name = Rippling Sword technique
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Rippling Sword technique]] releases [[sword]]-[[madra]] in a crescent shape.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin Arelius]] circulates the [[Rippling Sword technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Rippling Sword technique]] is a wave of silver madra that slices through the air.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
